---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code.

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*.



```{r}
# clearing the workspace
rm(list=ls(all=TRUE))
```

```{r}

view_flag<-TRUE
start_date <- "2014-08-01"
end_date <- "2019-12-01"

```

```{r}
# Loading the libraries that may prove useful
library("readxl")
library("stringi")
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(skimr)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(sqldf)
library(kableExtra)
library(plm)
library(lmtest)


# library(xlsx)
library(reshape2)
library(tibble)
library(panelr)
library(multiway)
library(stringr)
library(zoo)
library(arsenal)
library("data.table")
library(readr)
library(sqldf)
library(stringr)
library(fuzzyjoin)
library(lubridate)
library(MatchIt)
library(janitor)
library(forcats)
library(officer)
library(magrittr)
library(gridExtra)
library(magick)
library(grid)

library(panelView)
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)
library(DescTools)
library(car)
library(writexl)
library(fixest)
library(modelsummary)


```
